messages.message: Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from 'react-hooks/refs').

Error: Cannot access refs during render

React refs are values that are not needed for rendering. Refs should only be accessed outside of render, such as in event handlers or effects. Accessing a ref value (the `current` property) during render can cause your component not to update as expected (https://react.dev/reference/react/useRef).

  138 |         unreadCount,
  139 |         unreadNotifications,
> 140 |         socket: socketRef.current,
      |                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot access ref value during render
  141 |         setIsOpen,
  142 |         setActiveConvId,
  143 |         setMinimized,

Error: Cannot access refs during render

React refs are values that are not needed for rendering. Refs should only be accessed outside of render, such as in event handlers or effects. Accessing a ref value (the `current` property) during render can cause your component not to update as expected (https://react.dev/reference/react/useRef).

  150 |
  151 |     return (
> 152 |         <ChatContext.Provider value={value}>
      |                                      ^^^^^ Cannot access ref value during render
  153 |             {children}
  154 |         </ChatContext.Provider>
  155 |     );

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
